## Language Preference

**All responses, outputs, and generated documents produced by any speckit agent (specify, plan, clarify, tasks, implement, constitution, analyze, checklist, converge, etc.) MUST be written in Vietnamese (tiếng Việt).**

This applies to:
- All prose descriptions, rationale, and explanations
- Section headers that are free-form text (not fixed template keywords)
- Questions asked during clarification
- Checklist items and notes
- Summary and completion reports

Technical identifiers that must remain in English: file paths, code symbols, CLI commands, JSON/YAML keys, and fixed template placeholder names (e.g., `FR-001`, `SC-001`, `P1`, `US1`).
